LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS ABS GLOBAL TRADING LIMITED, ARTHUR HAYES, AND HDR GLOBAL TRADING LIMITED'S MOTION TO DISMISS OR STAY ON GROUND OF INCONVENIENT FORUM IS OFF CALENDAR. THE COURT, ON ITS OWN MOTION, FINDS THAT THE CASE SHOULD BE DESIGNATED AS COMPLEX AND SINGLY ASSIGNED. THE MOTION MAY BE RENOTICED IN THE APPROPRIATE DEPARTMENT AFTER ISSUANCE OF AN ORDER DESIGNATING THE CASE COMPLEX AND SETTING AN INITIAL CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendants ABS Global Trading Limited, Arthur Hayes, and HDR Global Trading Limited's Motion To Dismiss Or Stay On Ground Of Inconvenient Forum is Off calendar. The court, on its own motion, finds that the case should be designated as complex and singly assigned. The motion may be renoticed in the appropriate department after issuance of an order designating the case complex and setting an initial case management conference.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
